description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a clean, geometric design and expansive use of glass and concrete. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows along the sides, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The front facade includes a wide driveway, a garage, and a sheltered entryway, with a small red car parked in front. The building is set on a rectangular green lawn, with a mix of white and gray exterior walls and some wooden panel accents. The rear and side elevations reveal additional glass-walled rooms and a possible patio or terrace area. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with sharp lines and a focus on horizontal planes.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, white and gray walls, and a spacious driveway. The design is minimalist with clean lines and wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide driveway, garage, and a red car parked in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive glass walls and a long, rectangular layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a solid, clean facade.
description_view_3: Opposite front angle showing the garage, driveway, and a large glass-walled room on the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows
